symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $467.67 up 1.20% with pre-market at $443.00 down 5.28%. All moving averages above with GC above and 52-week high at $476.73 nearby. Strong sustained AI accelerator demand driving TSMC advanced packaging expansions like new CoWoS-L facility supports the setup.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $467.67에 마감 후 프리 $443.00에서 5.28% 하락했다. 모든 이평선 위 GC 위 52주 고점 $476.73 근처. AI 가속기 수요가 CoWoS-L 신규 시설 확장을 견인하며 셋업을 지지한다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Entry near pre-market $443.00 or breakout above $467.67
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: 프리 $443.00 근처 진입 또는 $467.67 돌파 기회

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $208.65 down 0.97% with pre-market at $203.06 down 2.68%. Price below moving averages but EMA200 rising with volume contraction near 52-week high $236.30. Active discussion around AI infrastructure efficiency gains and attractive valuations during pullback supports long-term conviction.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA는 $208.65에 마감 후 프리 $203.06에서 2.68% 하락했다. 이평선 아래이나 EMA200 상승 중 거래량 수축 52주 고점 $236.30 근처. AI 인프라 효율성 논의와 밸류에이션 매력이 롱텀 컨빅션을 지지한다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Price below EMA21 $210.15 with 11.7% below 52-week high

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA50 $206.83 리테스트 또는 거래량 확대 주시

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $563.85 down 2.32% with pre-market at $559.00 down 0.86%. Price below all moving averages with volume contraction. Long-term investors see attractive valuation and AI monetization in ads as buying opportunity despite 2026 capex concerns.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_ko: EMA200 $636.18 아래 52주 고점 대비 28.9% 하락 위험

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $405.05 up 1.14% with pre-market at $394.20 down 2.68%. Price below moving averages near EMA200 $396.87 with volume contraction. Tesla community rallying to defend FSD with crash data and push back on media reports while maintaining long-term conviction in autonomy and robotics.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA는 $405.05에 마감 후 프리 $394.20에서 2.68% 하락했다. 이평선 아래 EMA200 $396.87 근처 거래량 수축. Tesla 커뮤니티는 FSD 방어 데이터와 미디어 보도 반박하며 자율주행 로보틱스에 대한 컨빅션을 유지한다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Monitor for volume expansion above EMA50 $405.81

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $119.50 down 6.98% with pre-market at $119.89 up 0.33%. Price below all moving averages. Long-term holders see recent pullback as buying opportunity due to strong fundamentals, raised guidance, and major US Army contract win.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: 42.4% below 52-week high $207.47 with price below EMA200 $145.86

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,211.38 up 6.82% with pre-market at $1,096.49 down 9.48%. All moving averages above with GC above and 52-week high $1,213.81 nearby. Strategic AI partnership with Anthropic and HBM demand support long-term bullish views despite pre-earnings pullback.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $349.68 down 4.99% with pre-market at $342.60 down 2.02%. Price below moving averages near EMA200 $310.98 with RSI bullish divergence. Senior AI talent departures to OpenAI and Anthropic triggering concerns over execution and competitive edge.
